title: A visit to my grandparents
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: I spent last weekend with my grandparents, who live in a village outside the city. I had not visited them (27) the winter, so I was excited to see them again. On Saturday morning, my grandfather took me to the market, where he buys fresh vegetables every week. The market was busier (28) usual because there was a local food festival. My grandmother cooked lunch while we were out, and the meal was ready (29) the time we returned. In the afternoon, she showed me some old photos of my parents when they were young. We laughed (30) some of the clothes they used to wear. Before I left, my grandparents gave me a cake to take home (31) my family. I always enjoy staying there because life in the village feels very different (32) life in the city.
